```diff
+ * {
+     margin: 0;
+     padding: 0;
+     box-sizing: border-box;
+ }
+ 
+ body {
+     font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;
+     background-color: #f5f5f5;
+     padding: 20px;
+     min-height: 100vh;
+     display: flex;
+     justify-content: center;
+     align-items: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .container {
+     max-width: 800px;
+     width: 100%;
+     margin: 0 auto;
+ }
+ 
+ .step {
+     display: none;
+ }
+ 
+ .step.active {
+     display: block;
+ }
+ 
+ /* Landing Page Styles */
+ .landing-content {
+     position: relative;
+     width: 100%;
+     border-radius: 12px;
+     overflow: hidden;
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
+ }
+ 
+ .landing-image {
+     width: 100%;
+     height: auto;
+     display: block;
+ }
+ 
+ .landing-overlay {
+     position: absolute;
+     top: 0;
+     left: 0;
+     right: 0;
+     bottom: 0;
+     display: flex;
+     flex-direction: column;
+     justify-content: center;
+     align-items: center;
+     background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
+     padding: 40px;
+ }
+ 
+ .landing-title {
+     color: #fff;
+     font-size: 2.5rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     text-align: center;
+     margin-bottom: 30px;
+     text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
+     line-height: 1.2;
+ }
+ 
+ .start-button {
+     background-color: #0066cc;
+     color: white;
+     border: none;
+     padding: 16px 48px;
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     border-radius: 8px;
+     cursor: pointer;
+     transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
+ }
+ 
+ .start-button:hover {
+     background-color: #0052a3;
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: 0 6px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
+ }
+ 
+ .start-button:active {
+     transform: translateY(0);
+ }
+ 
+ /* Question Page Styles */
+ .question-container {
+     background: white;
+     border-radius: 12px;
+     padding: 30px;
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
+ }
+ 
+ .question-title {
+     font-size: 1.5rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     margin-bottom: 30px;
+     color: #333;
+     text-align: center;
+ }
+ 
+ .options-grid {
+     display: grid;
+     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
+     gap: 20px;
+     margin-bottom: 30px;
+ }
+ 
+ .option {
+     cursor: pointer;
+     border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
+     border-radius: 8px;
+     overflow: hidden;
+     transition: all 0.3s ease;
+     background: white;
+ }
+ 
+ .option:hover {
+     border-color: #0066cc;
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
+ }
+ 
+ .option.selected {
+     border-color: #0066cc;
+     border-width: 3px;
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.3);
+ }
+ 
+ .option img {
+     width: 100%;
+     height: 200px;
+     object-fit: cover;
+     display: block;
+ }
+ 
+ .option-text {
+     padding: 16px;
+     font-size: 0.95rem;
+     color: #333;
+     line-height: 1.4;
+     text-align: center;
+     background: white;
+ }
+ 
+ .question-footer {
+     display: flex;
+     flex-direction: column;
+     align-items: center;
+     gap: 15px;
+ }
+ 
+ .next-button {
+     background-color: #0066cc;
+     color: white;
+     border: none;
+     padding: 14px 40px;
+     font-size: 1rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     border-radius: 8px;
+     cursor: pointer;
+     transition: all 0.3s ease;
+     min-width: 120px;
+ }
+ 
+ .next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {
+     background-color: #0052a3;
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
+ }
+ 
+ .next-button:disabled {
+     background-color: #cccccc;
+     cursor: not-allowed;
+     opacity: 0.6;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-bar {
+     width: 100%;
+     height: 8px;
+     background-color: #e0e0e0;
+     border-radius: 4px;
+     overflow: hidden;
+     margin-top: 10px;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-fill {
+     height: 100%;
+     background-color: #0066cc;
+     transition: width 0.3s ease;
+     border-radius: 4px;
+ }
+ 
+ .progress-text {
+     font-size: 0.9rem;
+     color: #666;
+     font-weight: 500;
+ }
+ 
+ /* Result Page Styles */
+ .result-container {
+     position: relative;
+     width: 100%;
+     border-radius: 12px;
+     overflow: hidden;
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
+ }
+ 
+ .result-image {
+     width: 100%;
+     height: auto;
+     display: block;
+ }
+ 
+ .result-overlay {
+     position: absolute;
+     top: 0;
+     left: 0;
+     right: 0;
+     bottom: 0;
+     display: flex;
+     flex-direction: column;
+     justify-content: flex-start;
+     align-items: flex-start;
+     padding: 40px;
+     background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4));
+ }
+ 
+ .result-title {
+     color: #fff;
+     font-size: 2rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     margin-bottom: 10px;
+     text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
+ }
+ 
+ .result-description {
+     color: #fff;
+     font-size: 1.1rem;
+     margin-bottom: 30px;
+     text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
+     line-height: 1.5;
+ }
+ 
+ .restart-button {
+     background-color: #0066cc;
+     color: white;
+     border: none;
+     padding: 14px 40px;
+     font-size: 1rem;
+     font-weight: 600;
+     border-radius: 8px;
+     cursor: pointer;
+     transition: all 0.3s ease;
+     margin-top: auto;
+ }
+ 
+ .restart-button:hover {
+     background-color: #0052a3;
+     transform: translateY(-2px);
+     box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
+ }
+ 
+ /* Responsive Design */
+ @media (max-width: 600px) {
+     .options-grid {
+         grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+     }
+ 
+     .landing-title {
+         font-size: 1.8rem;

+         font-size: 1.2rem;

+

+         padding: 20px;
+     }
+ }
+
```

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,168 @@
- 
+ // Store user answers
+ let answers = [];
+ 
+ // Result data based on answer combinations
+ const results = [
+     {
+         image: 'images/result-1.jpg',
+         title: 'You\'re Carefully Comfortable!',
+         description: 'You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.'
+     },
+     {
+         image: 'images/result-2.jpg',
+         title: 'You\'re an Energy Champion!',
+         description: 'You\'re committed to making smart energy choices every day.'
+     },
+     {
+         image: 'images/result-3.jpg',
+         title: 'You\'re a Practical Saver!',
+         description: 'You focus on simple, effective ways to reduce energy use.'
+     },
+     {
+         image: 'images/result-4.jpg',
+         title: 'You\'re a Thoughtful Optimizer!',
+         description: 'You carefully consider each energy-saving opportunity.'
+     }
+ ];
+ 
+ // Initialize the quiz
+ function startQuiz() {
+     answers = [];
+     showStep('landing');
+     // Move to first question after a brief delay for smooth transition
+     setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+         showStep('question-1');
+     }, 300);
+ }
+ 
+ // Show a specific step
+ function showStep(stepId) {
+     // Hide all steps
+     const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');
+     steps.forEach(step =&gt; {
+         step.classList.remove('active');
+     });
+     
+     // Show the requested step
+     const step = document.getElementById(stepId);
+     if (step) {
+         step.classList.add('active');
+     }
+ }
+ 
+ // Handle option selection
+ function selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {
+     // Remove previous selection for this question
+     const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;
+     const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);
+     const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');
+     options.forEach(option =&gt; {
+         option.classList.remove('selected');
+     });
+     
+     // Mark selected option
+     const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;
+     selectedOption.classList.add('selected');
+     
+     // Store answer
+     answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;
+     
+     // Enable next button
+     const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);
+     if (nextButton) {
+         nextButton.disabled = false;
+     }
+     
+     // Update progress bar
+     updateProgress(questionNum);
+ }
+ 
+ // Update progress bar
+ function updateProgress(questionNum) {
+     const progressFill = document.getElementById(&#96;progress-${questionNum}&#96;);
+     if (progressFill) {
+         const percentage = (questionNum / 4) * 100;
+         progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;
+     }
+ }
+ 
+ // Move to next question
+ function nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {
+     if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {
+         if (currentQuestionNum &lt; 4) {
+             showStep(&#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;);
+         } else {
+             // All questions answered, show result
+             showResult();
+         }
+     }
+ }
+ 
+ // Calculate and show result
+ function showResult() {
+     // Simple result calculation based on answer sum
+     // You can modify this logic to determine results differently
+     const answerSum = answers.reduce((sum, answer) =&gt; sum + answer, 0);
+     
+     // Determine result index based on answer pattern
+     // This is a simple example - you can customize the logic
+     let resultIndex;
+     if (answerSum &lt;= 6) {
+         resultIndex = 0; // Carefully Comfortable
+     } else if (answerSum &lt;= 10) {
+         resultIndex = 1; // Energy Champion
+     } else if (answerSum &lt;= 14) {
+         resultIndex = 2; // Practical Saver
+     } else {
+         resultIndex = 3; // Thoughtful Optimizer
+     }
+     
+     const result = results[resultIndex];
+     
+     // Update result page
+     const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');
+     const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');
+     const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');
+     
+     if (resultImage) resultImage.src = result.image;
+     if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;
+     if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;
+     
+     // Show result page
+     showStep('result');
+ }
+ 
+ // Restart the quiz
+ function restartQuiz() {
+     answers = [];
+     
+     // Reset all option selections
+     const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');
+     allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {
+         option.classList.remove('selected');
+     });
+     
+     // Disable all next buttons
+     const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');
+     allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {
+         button.disabled = true;
+     });
+     
+     // Reset progress bars
+     const allProgressBars = document.querySelectorAll('.progress-fill');
+     allProgressBars.forEach(bar =&gt; {
+         bar.style.width = '0%';
+     });
+     
+     // Start from landing page
+     startQuiz();
+ }
+ 
+ // Initialize progress bars on page load
+ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
+     const progressBars = document.querySelectorAll('.progress-fill');
+     progressBars.forEach(bar =&gt; {
+         bar.style.width = '0%';
+     });
+ });
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Created a multi-step questionnaire application. Here's what I built:

## Files Created:

1. **`index.html`** — Structure:
   - Landing page with overlay text and "Start Now" button
   - 4 question pages, each with 4 options in a 2x2 grid
   - Result page with dynamic content

2. **`styles.css`** — Styling:
   - 800px max-width container
   - 2x2 grid layout for options (responsive to 1 column on mobile)
   - Hover and selection states
   - Progress bars
   - Overlay styling for landing and result pages

3. **`script.js`** — Functionality:
   - Multi-step navigation
   - Answer tracking
   - Progress bar updates
   - Result calculation based on answers
   - Restart functionality

## Features:

- Landing page with image overlay
- 4 questions, each with 4 options displayed in a 2x2 grid
- Visual feedback when selecting options
- Progress bars showing completion percentage
- Result page showing one of 4 result images based on answers
- Responsive design that works on mobile devices
- Smooth transitions between steps

Open `index.html` in your browser to test. The app starts on the landing page, then guides users through 4 questions, and displays a personalized result at the end.

Fixed the progress bar. Changes:

1. **Added progress bar to landing page** — Shows 0% initially
2. **Separated progress bar from question content** — Added a `progress-section` with spacing (`margin-top: 30px`) to separate it from the question container
3. **Updated progress logic** — Progress updates based on the current step:
   - **0%** on landing page
   - **25%** when moving to question 1 (after clicking "Start Now")
   - **50%** when moving to question 2
   - **75%** when moving to question 3
   - **100%** when moving to question 4

The progress bar now updates automatically when navigating between steps, and it's visually separated from the question content above it. The progress percentage text also updates to match the current step.

Test it: the progress bar should start at 0% on the landing page and increment as you move through the questions.

```json
  "contentsAfterEdit": "// Store user answers\nlet answers = [];\n\n// Result data based on answer combinations\nconst results = [\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-1.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re Carefully Comfortable!',\n        description: 'You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-2.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re an Energy Champion!',\n        description: 'You\\'re committed to making smart energy choices every day.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-3.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Practical Saver!',\n        description: 'You focus on simple, effective ways to reduce energy use.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-4.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Thoughtful Optimizer!',\n        description: 'You carefully consider each energy-saving opportunity.'\n    }\n];\n\n// Initialize the quiz\nfunction startQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    showStep('question-1');\n    setProgress(0);\n}\n\n// Show a specific step\nfunction showStep(stepId) {\n    // Hide all steps\n    const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');\n    steps.forEach(step =&gt; {\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        if (currentQuestionNum &lt; 4) {\n            showStep(&#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;);\n        } else {\n            // All questions answered, show result\n            showResult();\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Calculate and show result\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Simple result calculation based on answer sum\n    // You can modify this logic to determine results differently\n    const answerSum = answers.reduce((sum, answer) =&gt; sum + answer, 0);\n    \n    // Determine result index based on answer pattern\n    // This is a simple example - you can customize the logic\n    let resultIndex;\n    if (answerSum &lt;= 6) {\n        resultIndex = 0; // Carefully Comfortable\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 10) {\n        resultIndex = 1; // Energy Champion\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 14) {\n        resultIndex = 2; // Practical Saver\n    } else {\n        resultIndex = 3;   "contentsAfterEdit": "// Store user answers\nlet answers = [];\n\n// Result data based on answer combinations\nconst results = [\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-1.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re Carefully Comfortable!',\n        description: 'You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-2.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re an Energy Champion!',\n        description: 'You\\'re committed to making smart energy choices every day.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-3.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Practical Saver!',\n        description: 'You focus on simple, effective ways to reduce energy use.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-4.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Thoughtful Optimizer!',\n        description: 'You carefully consider each energy-saving opportunity.'\n    }\n];\n\n// Initialize the quiz\nfunction startQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    showStep('question-1');\n    setProgress(0);\n}\n\n// Show a specific step\nfunction showStep(stepId) {\n    // Hide all steps\n    const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');\n    steps.forEach(step =&gt; {\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    // Hide progress on landing and result pages\n    if (progressSection) {\n        if (stepId === 'landing' || stepId === 'result') {\n            progressSection.classList.add('hidden');\n        } else {\n            progressSection.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        if (currentQuestionNum &lt; 4) {\n            showStep(&#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;);\n        } else {\n            // All questions answered, show result\n            showResult();\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Calculate and show result\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Simple result calculation based on answer sum\n    // You can modify this logic to determine results differently\n    const answerSum = answers.reduce((sum, answer) =&gt; sum + answer, 0);\n    \n    // Determine result index based on answer pattern\n    // This is a simple example - you can customize the logic\n    let resultIndex;\n    if (answerSum &lt;= 6) {\n        resultIndex = 0; // Carefully Comfortable\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 10) {\n        resultIndex = 1; // Energy Champion\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 14) {\n        resultIndex = 2; // Practical Saver\n    } else {\n        resultIndex = 3; // Thoughtful Optimizer\n    }\n    \n    const result = results[resultIndex];\n    \n    // Update result page\n    const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');\n    const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n    const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n    \n    if (resultImage) resultImage.src = result.image;\n    if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n    if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;\n    \n    // Show result page\n    showStep('result');\n}\n\n// Restart the quiz\nfunction restartQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    \n    // Reset all option selections\n    const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Disable all next buttons\n    const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');\n    allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {\n        button.disabled = true;\n    });\n    \n    // Start from landing page and reset progress\n    setProgress(0);\n    showStep('landing');\n}\n\n// Initialize progress bars on page load\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateProgressForStep('landing');\n});\n\n"
}
```
